projects.name: domains-i-own-registry
projects.description: I often lose track of the domains I own and end up missing renewal emails, so I thought of turning this into a SaaS (lol).  The stack we’re using is highly performant and SEO optimized (even though SEO doesn’t really matter here), with a 0KB bundle size. (its just html bro)
